---
title: "Reach out"
---

I am currently seeking opportunities in data analysis (2 year work-study programme).

---

## Contact details

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

🔗 **LinkedIn**  
[illiakovalenko](https://www.linkedin.com/in/illiakovalenko){target="_blank"}

💻 **GitHub**  
[illiaskovalenko](https://github.com/illiaskovalenko){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

✉️ **Email**  
[illiaskovalenko@gmail.com](mailto:illiaskovalenko@gmail.com)

📍 **Location**  
Paris / Île-de-France

:::

:::

---

## References

Letters of recommendation available upon request.
